FlavourText.original:
"Tukohama may be asleep, but he still gives us his strength. A small
needle, an offering, and a vial... drink deeply, my son, and you
will more than survive the coming battle... you will thrive."
FlavourText.zh_cn:
“图克哈马虽然已经沉睡，但依然赐予我们力量。
一枚细针，一次供奉，一瓶圣液……喝下去吧，我的孩子，
你不只能在即将到来的战斗中活下去……你必将凯旋。”
FlavourText.zh_tw:
「圖克哈瑪或許早已長眠，但他仍舊給予我們力量。
一根細針、一份祭品和一只瓶子……
孩子，好好享受吧，你不只會在接下來的戰鬥存活下來……更會成長茁壯。」

group.original: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled

translation.zh_cn: 未保留的生命全满时不移除效果
translation.zh_tw: 未保留生命已滿時不移除效果

group.original: {0}% of Damage taken during effect [Recouped|Recouped] as Life

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间将所受伤害的 {0}% [Recouped|吸纳]为生命
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間所受傷害的 {0}% [Recouped|補償]為生命

group.original: Gain {0} [Rage|Rage] when [Hit|Hit] by an Enemy during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间被敌人[Hit|击中]时获得 {0} 点[Rage|怒火]
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間內遭敵人[Hit|擊中]時，獲得 {0} [Rage|盛怒]

group.original: No Inherent loss of [Rage|Rage] during effect

translation.zh_cn: 效果期间不具有固有的[Rage|怒火]损失
translation.zh_tw: 效果期間內無固有[Rage|盛怒]損失

FlavourText.original:
Olroth the Gallant,
tireless and true,
he fights for me,
he fights for you!
FlavourText.zh_cn:
勇敢的奥尔罗斯，
不知疲倦和真实，
他为我而战，
他为你而战！
FlavourText.zh_tw:
勇敢的奧爾羅斯，
不知疲倦和真實，
他為我而戰，
他為你而戰！

translation.zh_cn: 每次使用消耗的充能次数提高 {0}%
translation.zh_tw: 每次使用增加 {0}% 充能

group.original: Excess Life Recovery added as [Guard|Guard] for {0} seconds

translation.zh_cn: 溢出生命回复转化为[Guard|防卫]，持续 {0} 秒
translation.zh_tw: 多餘生命恢復會附加為[Guard|守護]，持續 {0} 秒

FlavourText.original:
"How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast?
Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows."
- Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom
FlavourText.zh_cn:
"我该如何面对在瓦尔克拉斯目睹的一切？
感谢先祖！我的酒杯，早已满溢。"
——冈姆前任军师拉维安加
FlavourText.zh_tw:
“我該如何面對我在瓦爾克拉斯所目睹的一切？
先祖保佑！我的酒杯，滿溢了。”
—拉維安加，岡姆的前任顧問

group.original: This Flask cannot be Used but applies its Effect constantly

translation.zh_cn: 此药剂无法使用，但效果持续生效
translation.zh_tw: 此藥劑無法使用，但會持續套用其效果

FlavourText.original: What is life, but a dreamlike spiral of panic?
FlavourText.zh_cn: 所谓生命，不就是噩梦般螺旋不止的恐慌吗？

group.original: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled

translation.zh_cn: 未保留的魔力全满时不移除效果
translation.zh_tw: 未保留法力已滿時不移除效果

group.original: Every {1} seconds during Effect, deal {0}% of Mana spent in those seconds as [Chaos Damage|Chaos Damage] to Enemies within {2} metres

translation.zh_cn: 生效期间每过 {1} 秒，对 {2} 米内的敌人造成这几秒内消耗魔力的 {0}% 的[Chaos Damage|混沌伤害]
translation.zh_tw: 在效果期間內每 {1} 秒，對 {2} 公尺內的敵人造成相當於在該秒數內所消耗魔力 {0}% 的[Chaos Damage|混沌傷害]

group.original: Deals {0}% of current Mana as [Chaos Damage|Chaos Damage] to you when Effect ends

translation.zh_cn: 效果结束时对你造成当前魔力 {0}% 的[Chaos Damage|混沌伤害]
translation.zh_tw: 效果結束時，對你造成相當於當前魔力 {0}% 的[Chaos Damage|混沌傷害]
